description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy, using the default runner image. Define a global before_script that runs `npm install` and copies `./src/config/config.staging.json` to `./src/config/config.json` for all jobs. Add a lint job in the test stage that executes `npm run lint`. Add three deploy jobs in the deploy stage: a `deploy` job for the production environment (only on the master branch) that runs `cp ./src/config/config.production.json ./src/config/config.json`, `npm run build`, `sudo rsync --stats -ahvI --delete ./dist/ /var/www/dashboard`, and `sudo chown -R apache:apache /var/www/dashboard`; a `deploy_development` job for the development environment (except on master and staging branches) that runs `npm run build`, `sudo rsync --stats -ahvI --delete ./dist/ /var/www/dashboard_development`, and `sudo chown -R apache:apache /var/www/dashboard_development`; and a `deploy_staging` job for the staging environment (only on the staging branch) that runs `npm run build`, `sudo rsync --stats -ahvI --delete ./dist/ /var/www/dashboard_staging`, and `sudo chown -R apache:apache /var/www/dashboard_staging`.
